description: LeadGraph is a market intelligence platform that maps 245 million global organizations into a knowledge graph, linking companies to people, funding, customers, and real-time news.
tagline: The most advanced B2B search engine ever built
overview: LeadGraph provides deep company intelligence by combining a knowledge graph of 245 million global organizations with fact-finding AI that continuously indexes news and data from across the internet. The result is a single platform where researchers, sales professionals, and analysts can access revenue history, funding data, competitor lists, and customer records in minutes.
what_is: LeadGraph is a market intelligence platform built for professionals who need comprehensive, verified data on companies worldwide. Its knowledge graph covers 245 million global organizations, including 79,000 public companies and 51,000 venture-backed startups, all structured and maintained by AI that continuously processes data from a wide range of public sources. This breadth and depth make it a strong choice for due diligence, competitive research, and identifying new market opportunities.

The platform delivers actionable output quickly. Users can generate ready-to-download reports and data charts covering revenue history, funding rounds, known customers, and competitors within minutes of initiating a search. LeadGraph's news tracking is particularly broad, indexing sources that many competing tools overlook, which helps users stay current on market developments before they become widely reported.

LeadGraph connects to CRM, sales, and enrichment workflows through an API, fitting naturally into existing GTM tech stacks. It is not intended for contact management or mass email campaigns. Its value lies in providing verified, in-depth company intelligence to analysts, sales teams, and business development professionals who need accurate data to support faster, better-informed decisions.
